tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes. Chloride is slightly above normal, but other electrolytes, renal function, and lipid profile are within reference ranges. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glycemic control and considering further evaluation for diabetes risk.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
